notes: India overlay: Deals archive has 1 unique days — need ≥ 5 for stable overlay.
News: 138 headlines aggregated; 19 of 95 picks tagged.
limitations: Universe is current-membership only — survivorship bias present.
Cost model: flat-bps slippage + fees, no Almgren-Chriss impact.
Walk-forward only — DSR / SPA / CPCV deferred.
India alt-data: NSE bulk/block deals only (smart-money flow). News sentiment + earnings parsing deferred.
